_note: Versioned price sheet so dollar-cost is comparable across models without hardcoding stale rates in report.py. Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens (input/output). `blended` assumes a 70% input / 30% output mix, used to ESTIMATE $ when a run carries only a total-token count. Verified against public pricing pages on 2026-06-14 (see _sources). VERIFY before quoting externally — list prices move.

gemma-4-31b-it.note: open-weight; no public API list price. May run via `gemini gemma` local routing (effectively free / self-hosted compute). UNRESOLVED — confirm at runtime.

droid_core_multipliers._note: Factory Droid Core models are priced as a MULTIPLIER on Factory's credit base, not per-token, so they are not directly comparable in the per-1M-token table above. Multipliers from docs.factory.ai/cli/user-guides/choosing-your-model.

droid-core-deepseek-v4-pro.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro
droid-core-deepseek-v4-pro.note: NOT listed among Droid Core models in Factory docs (which show DeepSeek V4 Flash elsewhere). May be BYOK or unavailable — confirm at runtime.

2026-06.blended_note: `blended` = USD/1M-token at 70% input / 30% output, for estimating $ from total-token-only runs. Exact input/output rates are used when a run carries a split.
